title: Free! Timeless Medley: The Promise
original_title: 劇場版 Free! -Timeless Medley- 約束
overview: The second Timeless Medley film mainly recaps Eternal Summer and a little bit of the first season. It focuses on Rin and Samezuka. It also includes new scenes and characters from High Speed.
